mapper.select:
SELECT product_id as productId , product_name as productName , brand_name as brandName , price , original_price as originalPrice , discount_rate as discountRate , product_url as productUrl FROM t_product WHERE 1=1
AND (product_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR brand_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND brand_name = #{brandName}
ORDER BY price ASC ORDER BY discount_rate DESC ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT product_id as productId , product_name as productName , brand_name as brandName , price , original_price as originalPrice , discount_rate as discountRate , product_url as productUrl FROM t_product WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_product (product_id, product_name, brand_name, price, original_price, discount_rate, product_url) VALUES (#{productId}, #{productName}, #{brandName}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{discountRate}, #{productUrl})
